Thanapong

Master's student in Data Analytics and Decision Science at RWTH Aachen University.

  • About

Welcome.

I specialize in Operations Research, data science, and machine learning. My academic and professional work focuses on solving complex structural problems using tools like linear programming, network flow, scheduling theory, and predictive modeling.

I also enjoy cooking Asian cuisine and am currently learning German.

Recent Work

  • Company Bankruptcy Prediction Model

    Data Science • Feb 2026

    Developed a machine learning pipeline utilizing logistic regression. Conducted rigorous feature selection using stepwise methods and correlation matrices, and evaluated performance via ROC curves.

  • Graph Theory & Optimization Analysis

    Operations Research • Jan 2026

    Implemented algorithms to solve classical OR problems including minimum spanning trees, vehicle routing, and the knapsack problem.
